docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-21-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY SIDNEY BERENSTEIN. HEARING SET FOR JAN-07-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
